name: sist
description: SIST (Ship Intelligence & Suspicion Tracker) is a web-based AIS monitoring and analysis platform. It detects suspicious vessel activity, anomalies, and potential AIS manipulation by analyzing live and historical AIS data. The tool helps maritime security teams, port authorities, and analysts identify high-risk behavior patterns across global shipping routes.
author: Tristan Budd (https://tristanbudd.com)
